## TDD Workflow

> Задачи организованы по TDD: Red → Green → Refactor.
> Phase 0 — .feature + integration test fixtures (Red). Phase 1-4 — skill implementation incrementally (Green). Phase 5 — refactor + verify.
>
> **OUT OF SCOPE для текущей сессии** (per user direction "пока только спеки"): эти tasks НЕ выполняются в текущей spec-creation сессии. Они document будущую implementation для отдельной сессии после spec approval.

## Phase 0: BDD Foundation (Red)

> Создать .feature файл, step definitions stubs, и fixtures ПЕРЕД реализацией.
> Framework: vitest (BDD-style describe/it + @featureN теги) — already installed (Evidence: tests/e2e/*.test.ts, package.json devDependencies vitest@^4.1.0). Bootstrap block НЕ нужен.

- [ ] T-0.1: Create `tests/features/spec-status.feature` (mirror of `.specs/honest-status-command/honest-status-command.feature`) -- @feature1, @feature2, @feature3, @feature4 — Status: TODO | Est: 30m
  _Source: `.specs/honest-status-command/honest-status-command.feature` (copy 1:1 + adjust paths)_
  **Done When:**
  - [ ] File exists с 4 scenarios HSCMD001_01..04
  - [ ] All scenarios tagged correctly @feature1..@feature4

- [ ] T-0.2: Create `tests/e2e/spec-status.test.ts` (integration test skeleton, step definitions stubs) -- @feature1,@feature2,@feature3,@feature4 — Status: TODO | Est: 30m
  _Requirements: All FR-1..FR-10_
  _Naming: describe(`HSCMD001: Honest Spec Status Command`) + it(`HSCMD001_NN: ...`) per extension-test-quality rule_
  **Done When:**
  - [ ] File exists with describe + 4 it() blocks 1:1 c .feature scenarios
  - [ ] Each it() throws "not implemented" placeholder

- [ ] T-0.3: Create fixtures F-1..F-10 в `tests/fixtures/spec-status/` -- @feature1,@feature2,@feature3,@feature4 — Status: TODO | Est: 60m
  _Source: FIXTURES.md F-1..F-10 detailed specs_
  **Done When:**
  - [ ] 3 mock spec directories (partial/claimed-only/all-verified) created
  - [ ] 3 sample test files (weak/strong/fake-positive)
  - [ ] 3 YAML samples (fresh/stale/completed)
  - [ ] Docker mock script (bash + .bat)

- [ ] T-0.4: Verify all 4 scenarios FAIL (Red) -- Status: TODO | Est: 15m
  _Verify: /run-tests -- npx vitest run tests/e2e/spec-status.test.ts → 0/4 passing_
  **Done When:**
  - [ ] All 4 it() blocks throw / fail
  - [ ] No accidental green tests

## Definition of Done

Implementation сессия будет considered done когда:

1. Все 4 HSCMD001_01..04 BDD scenarios GREEN
2. Sub-agent invocation works (Agent tool returns JSON conforming to SCHEMA)
3. Test quality patterns detect WEAK/STRONG/FAKE-POSITIVE-RISK accurately
4. Environmental blockers correctly разделены от test failures
5. No regression в существующих tests
6. Spec validate-spec + audit-spec clean
7. DESIGN.md "Reuse map" обновлён если изменения в reuse strategy
8. `/spec-status` works в реальном dev-pomogator session (manual smoke)
